programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: A community is rocked when a mother, her children, and their neighbor are brutally murdered; as detectives try to uncover who would commit a quadruple homicide, their investigation leads to an undeniable clue.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: Police find a nurse and mother bludgeoned to death in her home, and evidence suggests that someone she knew is the killer; when police learn about her involvement with multiple men, they consider an act of jealousy likely.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: The murder of a new mother shocks a quiet community, especially when investigators learn that her estranged U.S. Army sergeant husband has an alibi; investigators find evidence of a love triangle involving a woman who is willing to cross the line.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: Police are stunned when two young men are gunned down in their backyard; investigators find a heartbroken lover and a web of lies concealing the truth.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: In Lubbock, Texas, detectives respond to an early-morning robbery-turned-homicide; they're not sure where to start looking for the killer, then a surveillance video and an anonymous tip lead them to a secret.

programs.title: A Different World
programs.desc: Col. Taylor (Glynn Turman) is roasted at the campus military dinner; Dwayne issues a challenge to Whitley.
